message: Node started: The user wants a complete, high-performing Python solution for AtCoder AHC012. The previous child provided a template but lacked the core geometric logic (calculating piece membership) and the optimization engine (Simulated Annealing/Local Search). Please provide a complete, single-file Python script that: 1. Corrects the geometry logic to determine which strawberries fall into which region created by the intersection of chords. 2. Implements a robust optimization heuristic (like Simulated Annealing) to maximize the score. 3. Adheres to the input/output format of AtCoder AHC012. The solution should be ready to run and designed for high performance.
